text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our fourth concert comes to an end in<n>the blink of
an eye.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming to see us<n>today, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
No, thank YOU! You were great! Good<n>luck with the
Grand Concert!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka pauses on stage for a<n>moment,
listening to the fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, this seems like a good time for<n>me to slip out.
Be sure to take<n>everyone's pulse—immediately,
please.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's the small steps we take every<n>day that will
help prove my<n>hypothesis in the end.
choice_data_list: What exactly are you trying to prove?
What exactly are you trying to prove?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What indeed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If you must know, then I might say... a<n>"wish."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I hope hearing her fans' voices<n>during the
concert has encouraged<n><chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I hope she's been able to fulfill<n>whatever
ambitions drew her to the<n>Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that would be my wish, as<n>a trainer who
can only cheer her on<n>from off stage.
...ner? Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Hello? Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to bother while you're<n>preoccupied. There's
something I<n>really wanted to talk to you about.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning to ask the academy to<n>hold an
information session on the<n>Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Our concerts have gotten us<n>more supporters
among the students,<n>and consequently, many fans
as well.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Which is why it's time to face our<n>remaining
problems head-on.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
There are still people to whom I must<n>give a
proper explanation for the<n>Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the students of the academy and<n>the URA
director's board.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to negotiate with the<n>board, but in the
meantime, I'd like to<n>speak to the academy
students in my<n>own words.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
My words as someone who wants to<n>see a
concert for both Umamusume<n>and fans... and as a
fan myself.
choice_data_list: I'll talk to Director Akikawa on my end as well.
I'll talk to Director Akikawa on my end as well.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
You really don't have to. You've<n>helped me more
than enough already,<n>and I wouldn't want to
burden you<n>further.
choice_data_list: I'm a fan too. I want to help.
I'm a fan too. I want to help.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Well, that would be very much<n>appreciated. I
guess we're in this<n>together until the end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Light Hello and I get<n>Director
Akikawa's permission to<n>hold an info session for
the Grand<n>Concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of our hard work will be worth it in<n>the end. We
have to do everything we<n>can to support the girls!
